title: A German Man Built a 6-Foot Lego Sausage. It's a World Record.
script: Someone built a Lego bratwurst? Tommy Schmidt, a German Lego fanatic from Thuringia, spent a year assembling 65,000 bricks into a 6-foot-6 replica of a traditional bratwurst — complete with bun. Sausage company Die Thüringer commissioned it. Schmidt started with the idea, spent 6 months on the actual build, and has now officially broken the Guinness World Record for the world's largest Lego sausage. It is now on display at Die Thüringer's headquarters. In Thuringia — a region already obsessed with bratwurst enough to have a Bratwurst Museum — this is apparently not unusual. The sausage weighs more than most people's luggage. It took a year. It is made of plastic. It is inedible. So: was the Lego sausage worth a year of Tommy Schmidt's life?
